assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands for current versions, cluster health verification, and node status checking

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Section 1.2 provides the exact gcloud command 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR)"' to check available versions in Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Section 1.3 includes multiple methods for checking deprecated API usage including kubectl and gcloud recommender commands

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Section 2.1 provides the exact command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade [YOUR_CLUSTER_NAME] --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.33'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Section 2.3 includes verification commands and specifies expected output like 'Should show 1.33.x' for the control plane version check

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Sections 3.2 and 3.5 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools directly from 1.32 to 1.33, effectively using skip-level approach

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Sections 3.3 and 3.6 include monitoring commands like 'watch kubectl get nodes' and gcloud operations list commands to track upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook shows control plane upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33, followed by node pool upgrades that go directly to 1.33, demonstrating the skip-level approach for node pools

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation with commands to check node versions, pod health, kube-system pods, and application functionality

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes both troubleshooting section for common issues and a detailed rollback plan with specific commands for emergency situations
